snippets.description: ListDestinations lists the `Destination` resources in a specified project and location.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity ListLocations Sample
snippets.description:
ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
This method can be called in two ways: 

*   **List all public locations: ** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`.
*   **List project-visible locations: ** Use the path
`GET /v1/projects/{project_id}/locations`. This may include public
locations as well as private or other locations specifically visible
to the project.

and location.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity ListMulticloudDataTransferSupportedServices Sample
snippets.description:
ListMulticloudDataTransferSupportedServices lists the services in the project for a region that are supported for
Data Transfer Essentials.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity SetIamPolicy Sample
snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity TestIamPermissions Sample
snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity ListHubSpokes Sample

to the hub and spokes that have been proposed but not yet accepted.

Connectivity Center hub.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity RejectHubSpoke Sample
snippets.description:
RejectHubSpoke rejects a Network Connectivity Center spoke from being attached to a hub.
If the spoke was previously in the `ACTIVE` state, it
transitions to the `INACTIVE` state and is no longer able to
connect to other spokes that are attached to the hub.

snippets.title: networkconnectivity RejectSpokeUpdate Sample
snippets.description: RejectSpokeUpdate rejects a proposal to update a Network Connectivity Center spoke in a hub.
